headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if non-compliance with BRSR/GRI/TCFD, but no current exposure. — Adani Energy's acquisition of South Kalamb Transmission expands grid assets but triggers routine ESG disclosures
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, TCFD triggered; no penalties if disclosed as required.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is N/A.
No immediate cost of capital impact; green financing potential if taxonomy-aligned.
